REST API for integrating online stores with MTP Group (fulfillmentmtp.com.ua) fulfillment services. Supports order creation, inventory reporting, delivery management, and Nova Poshta / Ukrposhta carrier integration. All requests use HTTPS + UTF-8, JSON request/response bodies, authentication via `ApiKey` field obtained from MTP manager or via `GetToken` method.

Contact Support:
 Name: MTP Group Integration Support
 Email: info@fulfillmentmtp.com.ua
